personal.summary: I lead AI engineering organizations that turn generative and agentic AI into production platforms, operating workflows, and measurable business outcomes. My work spans multi-model orchestration, platform architecture, and enterprise transformation across mobility, mapping, and AI-native products.

knowledgeBase: Prasad Kavuri is currently Head of AI Engineering at Krutrim (March 2025 - Present), based in Naperville, IL. He leads enterprise adoption of agentic AI, moving AI from experimentation to measurable operating impact. He leads multi-model Generative and Agentic AI platform development including LLM orchestration, RAG, vector search, and real-time personalization powering India's first Agentic AI ecosystem — Kruti.ai.

At Krutrim, Prasad led architecture and strategy for India's first Agentic AI platform (Kruti.ai), delivering 50% lower latency and 40% cost savings through multimodal Agentic AI. He built and scaled a global engineering team delivering enterprise-grade 24/7 PaaS capabilities, integrating diverse AI models and vendors into a unified ecosystem.

At Krutrim, Prasad launched domain-specific AI agents for cab booking, food ordering, bill payments, and image generation, creating new B2B and B2C revenue streams. He drove technology vision for AI orchestration and SDK/API integration, ensuring adoption by enterprise clients and expansion of the Kruti.ai agent ecosystem.

Prasad was Senior Director of Engineering at Ola (September 2023 - February 2025). He led AI-driven platform transformation for Ola Maps, scaling cloud-native infrastructure, LLM-powered routing, and B2B APIs to 13,000+ customers, driving cost-efficient AI adoption across mobility.

At Ola, Prasad defined and executed a cloud-native roadmap that reduced infrastructure costs by 70% while enabling Ola Maps to scale API usage across millions of daily calls. He directed strategy and engineering for Ola Maps driving 13K+ B2B customers and built cross-functional engineering teams across the US and India.

At Ola, Prasad introduced AI-powered real-time route optimization for fleet management, boosting ETA accuracy and customer satisfaction. He negotiated and managed strategic vendor partnerships, driving operational efficiency and accelerating adoption in electric mobility and transport sectors.

Prasad spent 18+ years at HERE Technologies (May 2005 - September 2023) in Chicago, IL, progressing from Senior Engineer to Director of Engineering for Highly Automated Driving. He managed a global team of 85+ engineers and delivered autonomous driving datasets for major OEMs.

Prasad's AI and ML skills: Agentic AI Architecture, Multi-Model LLM Orchestration, RAG, Vector Search and Embeddings, Transformer Models and BERT, Real-time Personalization, AI Agent Development, CrewAI, LangGraph, LLM Ops and MLOps.

Prasad's cloud and infrastructure skills: AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes and Microservices, CI/CD and DevOps, Infrastructure as Code, Cloud-Native Architecture, API Platform Development, PaaS and Platform Ecosystems.

Prasad's leadership: managed global teams of 200+ engineers across US, Europe and India. P&L management, executive stakeholder management, strategic vendor partnerships, cost optimization achieving 50-70% reductions.

Prasad's education: MBA Strategic Marketing from Northern Illinois University (2012-2014). MCA from Osmania University (1999-2002). BSc Computer Maintenance & Engineering from Osmania University (1996-1999).
Prasad's certifications: ITIL Foundation, Introduction to Responsible AI, Building AI Plugins With Semantic Kernel, The Data Scientist's Toolbox.

Prasad's key achievements: 50% latency reduction at Krutrim, 40% cost savings at Krutrim, 70% infrastructure cost reduction at Ola, 13,000+ B2B customers at Ola Maps, 200+ engineers led globally, 18+ years at HERE Technologies.

Prasad's industry expertise: Autonomous Systems, Computer Vision, Mobility and Transportation, Mapping and GIS, Automotive Technology, Fleet Management, Enterprise AI Integration, B2B SaaS Platforms, Electric Mobility.

Prasad is based in Naperville, IL (Greater Chicago Area). Contact: vbkpkavuri@gmail.com. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/pkavuri. Portfolio: prasadkavuri.com. GitHub: github.com/prasad-kavuri. Languages: English, Hindi, Telugu, Urdu.
